name: Session Stack Review
description: Review a PersonaKit session and its defining artifacts with findings, SWOT, deliverable-confidence scoring, red-pen recommendations, and a rescored summary.

notes: Trace the target session through its actual directive, intents, essentials, and exposed docs before scoring confidence.
Prioritize findings over summary language; if the stack is weak, say so plainly.
Use file-by-file SWOT and confidence scoring instead of one blended overall verdict alone.
Red-pen recommendations should prefer the smallest contract hardening changes that materially improve reliability.
Do not silently implement fixes during the review pass unless AJ explicitly requested a follow-up change.
